_notes: G7 members: 7 major advanced economies. The European Union also participates as a non-enumerated member but isn't a state and so isn't represented as a country highlight here. Russia was suspended from the then-G8 in 2014 and the group reverted to G7.
name: Group of Seven
mission: Forum of seven major advanced economies — Canada, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, the United Kingdom, and the United States — coordinating on global economic governance, security, and shared political values.
